TaxMate UK Design System
Foundations Components Patterns Dashboard

A friendlier way to see your tax.

Foundations, components and patterns for TaxMate UK — built to make self assessment feel calm, clear, and a little bit human.

Typography

Display / Manrope 800 Estimated tax owed
Heading / Manrope 700 Your income this year
Body / Inter 400 We estimate this from the income and expenses you've added so far. It'll update automatically as you go.
Caption / Inter 600 Last updated 2 hours ago

Radius & elevation

radius-sm · 8px
radius-md · 14px
radius-lg · 22px
shadow-card
